items.title: Jay Bilas says Darryn Peterson has the NBA Scoring Title in his future 👀
items.body_excerpt: Jay Bilas says Darryn Peterson has the NBA Scoring Title in his future 👀 "The last guy I could say that scored it as easily as Peterson was Kevin Durant." The Jazz rookie's wasted NO time, averaging 26.5 points (52.8 FG%) in his first 3 Summer League games 🪣🔥
